category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: 6 URL(s) point to different domain(s) Items (5/6): - https://hikara-photobox.vercel.app [host: hikara-photobox.vercel.app] - https://hikara-photobox.vercel.app/reservasi [host: hikara-photobox.vercel.app] - https://hikara-photobox.vercel.app/privacy-policy [host: hikara-photobox.vercel.app] - https://hikara-photobox.vercel.app [host: hikara-photobox.vercel.app] - https://hikara-photobox.vercel.app/reservasi [host: hikara-photobox.vercel.app]

category.name: Core SEO
category.rule: Title too short Pages (1): /reservasi Items (1): - /reservasi (Reservasi | Hikara Photobox (27 chars))

Description too short Pages (2): /privacy-policy, /reservasi Items (2): - /privacy-policy (Privacy policy for Hikara Photobox customers. (45 chars)) - /reservasi (Pesan jadwal photoshoot Anda di Hikara Photobooth (59 chars))

category.name: Security
category.rule: Page not served over HTTPS Pages (3): /, /privacy-policy, /reservasi

category.name: Links
category.rule: Page has no outgoing internal links (dead-end) Pages (1): /privacy-policy

category.name: Content

category.name: Accessibility
category.rule: 2 problematic ID(s) in ARIA attributes Pages (1): /reservasi Items (2): - "radix-_R_4kuatpeul5rlb_" (not found) - "radix-_R_54uatpeul5rlb_" (not found)
1 select element(s) without accessible names Pages (1): /reservasi Items (1): - select
2 focusable element(s) inside aria-hidden Pages (1): /reservasi Items (2): - select (self is focusable) - input (self is focusable)
2 input field(s) without accessible names Pages (1): /reservasi Items (2): - input[type="checkbox"] - select
1 toggle field(s) without accessible names Pages (1): /reservasi Items (1): - checkbox
1 element(s) where visible text doesn't match accessible name Pages (1): /reservasi Items (1): - button: visible="pilih tanggal lebih " vs aria-label="pilih waktu sesi"
1 button(s) without accessible names Pages (1): /reservasi Items (1): - custom_frame
2 form input(s) without labels Pages (1): /reservasi Items (2): - select - checkbox
